mxCell.value: UC-REC-05: Initiate Org Recovery L2 Dispute
UC-PROF-12: Link Evidence to Profile Claim

diagram.name: UCD-05 Source Code & Git Repository Analysis

mxCell.value: Source Code & Git Repository Analysis System
UC-GIT-04: Link Repository to Profile Project
UC-GIT-07: Dispatch Payload to CVerify.AI Engine
UC-GIT-10: Attribute Skill Contributions via Commits
UC-GIT-11: Track AI Analysis Job Progress
UC-GIT-13: Cancel / Rerun Failed Analysis Job
UC-INT-11: Search Talent Pool with Filters
UC-INT-14: Save Candidate to Talent Pool

diagram.name: UCD-07 AI Interactive Chat & Interview Guidance

mxCell.value: AI Interactive Chat & Interview Guidance System
UC-CHAT-01: Create New AI Chat Session
UC-CHAT-02: Send Message to AI Assistant
UC-JOB-06: Extract Capability Requirements via AI
UC-JOB-10: Publish Job to Public Portal
UC-NOTIF-03: Mark All Notifications as Read
